Class OrderItem

java.lang.Object
com.project.model.OrderItem
public class OrderItem extends Object
Represents an item within a customer order.

This class encapsulates information about individual items in an order, including drink specifications, customizations, and associated toppings.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    OrderItem.Topping
    Represents a topping added to an order item.

  • Constructor Details

    • OrderItem

      public OrderItem(int itemId, int orderId, int menuItemId, String itemName, int quantity, double unitPrice, double subtotal, String size, String sugarLevel, String iceLevel)
      Constructs a new order item with all details, typically used when reading existing items back from the database.
      Parameters:
      itemId - the unique identifier for this order item
      orderId - the identifier of the parent order
      menuItemId - the identifier of the associated menu item
      itemName - the name of the item
      quantity - the ordered quantity
      unitPrice - the price per unit
      subtotal - the total price for this item
      size - the selected size (e.g., 'Regular', 'Large')
      sugarLevel - the selected sugar level (e.g., '100%', '50%')
      iceLevel - the selected ice level (e.g., 'Regular', 'No Ice')

    • OrderItem

      public OrderItem(int itemId, int orderId, int menuItemId, String itemName, int quantity, double unitPrice, double subtotal)
      Legacy 7-arg constructor for backward compatibility.
